arts.ttl: Jorginho could join Immobile at Besiktas from Arsenal
arts.sum: According to reports in Turkey, Italy international midfielder Jorginho could reunite with Ciro Immobile at...

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal are making a MISTAKE with new Leandro Trossard contract
arts.sum: While Trossard has never been considered an explosive player, handing him a pay-rise and a long-term deal at the age of 29 could backfire on the Gunners if he does fail to recapture his best form like so many others approaching their thirties. Arsenal are in talks to hand a new contract to Leandro Trossard in a move which could see the Belgian net a pay rise after his impact in the last 18 months.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news with five doubts amid Bukayo Saka and Leandro Trossard updates
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will be hoping Bukayo Saka and Leandro Trossard overcome their latest injury doubts in time to line up for Arsenal against Nottingham Forest, otherwise the manager is going to face problems. "It doesn’t look good, because for two players of that importance to tell you they cannot continue in the game [versus Chelsea], obviously it’s not good news," Arteta reacted at the time.

arts.ttl: Wrexham take ex-Liverpool star and Arsenal Premier League winner's son, 18, on trial
arts.sum: Manager Phil Parkinson's squad has largely been made up of lower league stars up until now as Wrexham rise up the divisions, but he could ssoon have a famous name to call upon

arts.ttl: The reincarnation of Nuno Espirito Santo, Nottingham Forest’s shrewd tactician who failed at Spurs
arts.sum: After thriving at Wolves and floundering at Tottenham, Nuno’s third coming in the Premier League is turning into a sensational success story

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star 'finding it difficult' at new club with transfer 'not working out'
arts.sum: Following a challenging start to the 2024/2025 season, Deportivo appointed Oscar Gilsanz as their new manager, and he has explained why Patino's signing hasn't worked out for him and the club so far. Former Arsenal midfielder Charlie Patino has made a difficult start to life at Deportivo La Coruna since his £1million move this summer .

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea handed unexpected January transfer boost after Ruben Amorim Man Utd problem
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have been handed something of an unexpected boost with the January transfer window due to open soon. Chelsea, meanwhile, have spent big in previous windows and it will be interesting to see if they continue to spend this winter.

arts.ttl: Man City handed significant injury boost in title race against Arsenal and Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal's title rivals Manchester City have been handed a significant injury boost ahead of their Premier League clash with Tottenham Hotspur on Saturday evening. In particular, De Bruyne hasn't started a game for City since their 0-0 draw against Inter Milan in the Champions League back in September.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri tells Mikel Arteta exactly what he wants to hear after Arsenal opportunity
arts.sum: Arsenal youngster Ethan Nwaneri has told Mikel Arteta exactly what he wants to hear about first-team training. The young midfielder has discussed breaking into the first-team on Arsenal's official social media channel, with fellow prospect Myles Lewis-Skelly.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star 'set for bumper pay rise' after last-minute transfer swoop
arts.sum: Arsenal have opened talks with Leandro Trossard over a new contract in light of interest from the Saudi Pro League, according to recent reports. Now, it has been claimed by the Daily Mail that the Gunners have now opened talks with the player over a new contract with a significant pay increase.
